text:
Our nation's financial well-being depends on the personal financial success of each one of us.

This book is about our individual successes. Success means achieving things through our own hard work and skills. Good preparation is essential for success. Our actions can only be as wise as our thoughts. And our thoughts can only be as wise as our understanding.

This book, which offers solutions for empty wallets, has been called a guide to financial understanding. And that's exactly what it aims to do: to give people who want financial success insights that will help them get money, keep it, and make their extra money earn even more.

In the following pages, we travel back to ancient Babylon. This city was the birthplace of the fundamental financial principles that are still recognized and used worldwide today.

To new readers, the author hopes these pages will inspire them in the same way. He wishes they find inspiration for growing bank accounts, achieving greater financial success, and solving tough personal money problems. Many readers from all over the country have enthusiastically reported such results.

The author also wants to thank the business executives. They have generously shared these stories with friends, relatives, employees, and colleagues. There's no better recommendation than from practical people who value this book's lessons. They value them because they've achieved significant success themselves by using the very principles this book promotes.

Babylon became the richest city in the ancient world because its people were the wealthiest of their era. They understood how valuable money was. They followed smart financial rules for getting money, keeping it, and making it grow. They secured what we all want: income for the future.

G. S. C.
